title: dactylorhiza incarnata var. haussknechtii
intro: Dactylorhiza incarnata var. haussknechtii, also known as the spotted marsh orchid, is a type of orchid that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and treat various respiratory issues. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
